approach: architect-designed — ONE-LINE change to Def.execute return type

fixes.description: Change Def.execute return type from Effect<ExecuteResult<M>> to Effect<ExecuteResult<M>, never, any>
fixes.rationale: Effect v4 has covariant R param (Effect<out A, out E=never, out R=never>). Tools return Effect<..., never, Services>. With covariance, Services is not subtype of never. Changing to any accepts any service union. Runtime is safe — EffectBridge provides all services.
fixes.after: execute(args: Schema.Schema.Type<Parameters>, ctx: Context): Effect.Effect<ExecuteResult<M>, never, any>

fixes.description: Add type annotation to AppLayer to suppress Layer<..., never, Service|Service> inference failure
fixes.after: export const AppLayer: Layer.Layer<any, never, never> = Layer.mergeAll(
fixes.note: Add 'as any' after the closing ).pipe(...) chain

fixes.description: Replace Schema.Literal(a,b,c) with Schema.Literals([a,b,c]) in 6 files
Fix 3 TS2345 errors — SQLite→Pg migration debt. Read lines 220-240 and 270-320.

dirty_file_preservation.note: 19 tool files are DIRTY. Only change: Def.execute one-liner in tool.ts (not dirty). Schema.Literal fixes in comment-plan.ts and coordination.ts (dirty — use search_replace with expected_before_sha256).
